topics: Image quantization - uniform quantizer. Image transforms -Two dimensional orthogonal and unitary transforms - properties of unitary transforms
intensity level slicing - bit extraction. Histogram processing
Magnification and interpolation. Image Enhancement in Spatial domain: Smoothing and sharpening operations in time domain
Filtering in frequency domain: Smoothing and sharpening frequency domain filters
Region-based methods- region growing and region merging
Boundary-based methods- edge detection and linking
Features - describing the contents and the shape of objects. Classification- Supervised and unsupervised learning. Discriminant analysis
k-nearest-Neighbor (kNN) classifier. Unsupervised- k-means clustering. Deep Learning for Medical Image Analysis
Convolutional Neural Networks. Image fusion for hybrid imaging
Super resolution imaging. Suggestion on Project Implementation ● In the first class

students shall be given an awareness and/ or guidelines on how to implement and learn this course through a project and are asked to form groups of maximum five members in the first week. ● Each group should identify a project where different image processing techniques can be used for biomedical image processing applications and perform a literature survey. ● Choose a suitable dataset
proper processing techniques and suitable machine learning
deep learning or computer vision algorithms for your application. ● Develop the block diagram

the flowchart and necessary codes and present them before the jury within the first month after the commencement of classes. ● Implement the necessary algorithms. ● Prepare a report and present before the jury for final evaluation
